mapper.select: select tai.sens_no , tai.district_no , tai.sens_chnl_id , tai."1st_lvl_min" as min1 , tai."1st_lvl_max" as max1 , tai."2nd_lvl_min" as min2 , tai."2nd_lvl_max" as max2 , tai."3rd_lvl_min" as min3 , tai."3rd_lvl_max" as max3 , tai."4th_lvl_min" as min4 , tai."4th_lvl_max" as max4 , tai.lvl_apply_dt from tb_alarm_info tai join tb_sensor_info tsi on tai.sens_no = tsi.sens_no and tsi.sms_snd_yn = 'Y'

select tmd.mgnt_no , tmd.raw_data , tmd.meas_dt , tmd.formul_data from tb_measure_details tmd join tb_sensor_init tsi on tsi.sens_no = tmd.sens_no and coalesce(tsi.sens_chnl_id, '') = coalesce(tmd.sens_chnl_id, '') where tmd.sens_no = #{sens_no} and coalesce(tmd.sens_chnl_id, '') = coalesce(#{sens_chnl_id}, '') and tmd.meas_dt between TO_TIMESTAMP(#{meas_dt_start}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss.ff6') and TO_TIMESTAMP(#{meas_dt_end}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss.ff6') and ( (#{min_formul_data} is not null and (tmd.formul_data - tsi.formul_data) <= #{min_formul_data}::double precision) or (#{max_formul_data} is not null and (tmd.formul_data - tsi.formul_data) >= #{max_formul_data}::double precision) ) order by tmd.meas_dt desc limit 1
select tsr.alarm_lvl_nm , tsr.mgnt_no , tsr.district_no , tsr.sms_recv_ph , tsr.sms_chgr_nm , tsr.sms_recv_dept from tb_sms_receiver tsr where tsr.district_no = #{district_no}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_alarm_details (district_no, mgnt_no, sens_no, sens_chnl_id, meas_dt, raw_data, formul_data, alarm_lvl_cd, net_err_yn) values (#{district_no}, #{mgnt_no}, #{sens_no}, #{sens_chnl_id}, #{meas_dt}::timestamp, #{raw_data}::double precision, #{formul_data}::double precision, #{alarm_lvl_cd}, #{net_err_yn})
mapper.select: select tdi.district_no , tdi.site_no , tsi.site_nm , tdi.district_nm , tdi.dist_addr , tdi.dist_zip , tdi.dist_road_addr , tdi.dist_type_cd , tdi.dist_abbr , tdi.dist_pic , tdi.dist_view_pic , tdi.dist_lon , tdi.dist_lat , tdi.dist_zoom , tdi.inst_comp_id1 , tdi.meas_comp_id1 , tdi.inst_comp_id2 , tdi.meas_comp_id2 , tdi.meas_str_ymd , tdi.meas_end_ymd , tdi.dist_offi_nm from tb_district_info tdi left join tb_site_info tsi on tsi.site_no = tdi.site_no where tdi.district_no = #{district_no}
select tsi.sens_no, tsi.sens_nm, tsi.senstype_no, tst.sens_tp_nm from tb_sensor_info tsi left join tb_sensor_type tst on tsi.senstype_no = tst.senstype_no where sens_no = #{sens_no}
select partner_comp_nm , maint_rep_nm from tb_maintcomp_info where partner_comp_id = #{partnerCompId} limit 1
select count(*) from tb_alarm_details where sens_no = #{sens_no} and coalesce(sens_chnl_id, '') = coalesce(#{sens_chnl_id}, '') and meas_dt >= now() - interval '24 hours'

WITH comm AS ( SELECT a.sens_no, CASE WHEN BOOL_OR(COALESCE(lmd.err_cnt, 999999) >= COALESCE(a.nonrecv_limit_min, 1)) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS is_received FROM tb_sensor_info a LEFT JOIN tb_sensor_chnl e ON a.sens_no = e.sens_no LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - m.meas_dt)) / 60 - 1 AS err_cnt FROM tb_measure_details m WHERE m.sens_no = e.sens_no AND m.sens_chnl_id = e.sens_chnl_id ORDER BY m.meas_dt DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS lmd ON TRUE WHERE a.sms_snd_yn = 'Y' AND a.sens_no IN ( SELECT tlim.sens_no FROM tb_logr_idx_map tlim WHERE tlim.logr_no IN ( SELECT tli.logr_no FROM tb_logger_info tli WHERE tli.district_no = #{district_no} ) ) GROUP BY a.sens_no ) SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) AS total_cnt, COALESCE(SUM(is_received), 0) AS receive_cnt, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((SUM(is_received)::numeric / COUNT(*)::numeric) * 100, 1) END AS receive_rate FROM comm

SELECT m.formul_data FROM tb_sensor_info s JOIN tb_logr_idx_map lim ON lim.sens_no = s.sens_no JOIN tb_logger_info li ON li.logr_no = lim.logr_no JOIN tb_measure_details m ON m.sens_no = s.sens_no WHERE li.district_no = #{district_no} AND s.senstype_no = '001' ORDER BY m.meas_dt DESC LIMIT 1
